actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour component fileID 1633495861 on Phone_Blue uses script guid 036aa4c6ab8e55144a03e8aefc6e9cca (PhoneRingScreen) with serialized field calling_material set to guid 8669b00696550574cb2f5a0480bbc344. This script toggles the Renderer material based on AudioSource.isPlaying in Update. To cover the 'ringing' branch (material = calling_material), the attached AudioSource must be playing (e.g., playOnAwake enabled or an external event starts it). To cover the 'idle' branch (material = original_material), the AudioSource must not be playing. No public no-arg methods are exposed by PhoneRingScreen; thus no direct method calls are available.
